---
anchor-sections: false
section-divs: false
css: assets/index.css
toc: false
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12}

# Data Science for Biology Workshop Series
:::

:::{.g-col-8}

A hands-on workshop series introducing data science workflows for biology
researchers.

**Who is it for?**

Researchers who want to build a foundation of data analysis and
bioinformatics skills. No prior programming experience is required.

**What you'll do**

Work through reproducible data analysis in Quarto notebooks, using a coding
assistant to learn as you go.

:::

::: {.g-col-4 .text-start .align-self-start}

![](assets/images/workshop_logo.svg){fig-alt="Workshop logo" width=100%}

:::

:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](assets/images/workshop-teaching-1.jpg){.img-fluid fig-alt="Instructor working with participants at laptops"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](assets/images/workshop-room.jpg){.img-fluid fig-alt="Wide view of the workshop room with participants at tables"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](assets/images/workshop-lecture.jpg){.img-fluid fig-alt="Participants watching a presentation"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](assets/images/workshop-teaching-2.jpg){.img-fluid fig-alt="Instructor helping a participant at their laptop"}
:::

:::

## Getting started

New here? Head to the [Get Started](getting-started.qmd) page to open the
workshop environment and begin.

## Past workshops

Materials from previous workshops are archived on the
[Past Workshops](past-workshops.qmd) page.
